variants: Adda Kallai grew up in Shadowcrest Hamlet and later attended Albatross Bay Academy. In addition to her professional commitments, Adda serves as the Project Lead for Indigo Sky Refuge, reflecting her dedication to civic and volunteer efforts within her community.
